title: Charming Caramelized Vietnamese Goat Meat Bun Cha
description: A winey and springy Vietnamese dish featuring goat meat, perfect for a lazy Sunday, made with robata-grill and sugar-free-friendly ingredients, served in a ramekin as bun cha.

ingredients.name: fresh herbs
ingredients.notes: such as mint, basil, or cilantro

instructions: Preheat the robata-grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together fish sauce, lime juice, and brown sugar substitute.
Add the sliced goat meat to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the goat meat from the marinade and cook on the robata-grill for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
In a small bowl, mix together minced garlic and grated ginger.
Add the garlic-ginger mixture to the cooked goat meat and toss to coat.
To assemble the bun cha, place a portion of cooked rice noodles in the bottom of a ramekin.
Add a few slices of the caramelized goat meat on top of the noodles.
Garnish with fresh herbs, chopped peanuts, and a drizzle of sesame oil.
